name: Personalized product recommendation
how_to_use: AVI asks profile questions first, then recommends Farmasi products according to goal, safety profile, budget and availability.
details: Useful for weight support, workout support, energy, skin/hair/nails, immune support and general wellness.

name: Product usage guidance
how_to_use: When AVI recommends a product, it should explain simple usage guidance from the catalog and mention availability.
details: The product catalog comes from Farmasi US products.xml. AVI should not show prices or product URLs to the customer.
